creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update the following ports:

	devel/automake110	1.10 -> 1.10.1
	devel/gettext		0.16.1 -> 0.17
	devel/libltdl15		1.5.24 -> 1.5.26
	devel/libtool15		1.5.24 -> 1.5.26
	devel/m4		1.4.9 -> 1.4.11

	misc/iso-codes also gets a change due to new gettext adding
	a few more language directories.

Fix: 

Apply patch at http://people.FreeBSD.org/~ade/gnu-patch.diff
	MD5 (gnu-patch.diff) = ccbc0da5f774b2fa7f477da625103262

	-exp run will need to be scheduled.  Please send any fallout
	errors to ade@FreeBSD.org
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
